# ekkOS Documentation

> Complete technical documentation for ekkOS — the intelligence layer for AI development.

## What This Site Contains

This is the official documentation for ekkOS, covering setup, configuration, MCP tools, memory architecture, the Golden Loop, and integration guides.

## Key Documentation Sections

- **Getting Started**: Installation, first setup, connecting to Claude Code or other MCP clients.
- **Memory Architecture**: 10-layer memory system — working, episodic, semantic, pattern, meta, collective, procedural, codebase, directive, and dream layers.
- **MCP Tools Reference**: Complete reference for all 70+ MCP tools including ekkOS_Search, ekkOS_Forge, ekkOS_Track, ekkOS_Outcome, ekkOS_Directive, and more.
- **Golden Loop**: How patterns are forged, applied, tracked, and refined over time.
- **Proxy Configuration**: Setting up the transparent proxy that enriches AI conversations.
- **Directive System**: Creating MUST/NEVER/PREFER/AVOID rules that persist across sessions.
- **Pattern Forging**: How to capture reusable solutions from bug fixes and learnings.
- **Dream Forge**: Overnight memory consolidation and pattern strengthening.

## Links

- Main site: https://ekkos.dev
- Documentation: https://docs.ekkos.dev
- API Reference: https://docs.ekkos.dev/api
